title: Customization
summary: Offer comprehensive customized services, including wax materials, fragrance types, colors, sizes, label printing and packaging design.
heroText: Offer comprehensive customized services, including wax materials, fragrance types, colors, sizes, label printing and packaging design.

sections.title: Personalized candles
sections.description:
At Sunwing Technology, we specialize in personalized candle solutions tailored to your brand and market needs. From home décor collections and gift candles to private label and online sales projects, we provide flexible OEM and print-on-demand services to support your business growth.

Sunwing Technology offers full customization options including wax materials, fragrance types, colors, sizes, label printing, and packaging design. With consistent quality and attractive scents, we help brands create candles that stand out in competitive markets.

sections.title: Candle type
sections.description: Different wax materials can be selected based on market positioning and usage scenarios, including soy wax, paraffin wax, beeswax, and mixed wax solutions. We can achieve a professional balance among environmental attributes, combustion stability, fragrance diffusion ability and cost, to meet the needs of retail, gifts and brand customization.

sections.title: Customized fragrance design
sections.description: Offer a rich range of fragrance types, including floral, fruity, woody, fresh and seasonal scents. At the same time, support for unscented candles or the development of exclusive fragrances, helping brands create unique olfactory memories and enhancing product recognition.

sections.title: Color customization
sections.description: Supports multiple color customization options, including single color, gradient color and special texture effects. Can be precisely tinted according to the brand VI or Pantone color codes to ensure that the appearance of the candles is highly consistent with the overall packaging style.

sections.title: Shape And Size
sections.description: From standard cylindrical candles and cup-shaped candles to creative-shaped candles, all can be customized. The weight and size can be flexibly selected, suitable for various applications such as birthday candles, scented candles, home decorations or promotional gifts.

sections.title: Custom Packaging
sections.description: Provide comprehensive packaging solutions, including glass jars, metal boxes, colorful boxes and gift boxes. Support eco-friendly materials, high-end customization and e-commerce-friendly packaging designs, to enhance product value and market competitiveness.

sections.title: LOGO Customization
sections.description: Support silk-screening, labeling and full-color printing techniques. Customizable with brand LOGO, product information, blessing words and QR codes. Helps customers create a professional and unified brand image, suitable for OEM/ODM mass production.

highlightsHeading.title:
Create your
own personalized candles
highlightsHeading.description: Customize your own unique candles according to your own preferences.

highlights.title: Small minimum order
highlights.description: you have the flexibility to choose the exact quantity that best suits your needs.  we accommodate all customization requests.

highlights.title: Powerful design tool
highlights.description: Our professional custom candle maker will help you perfect a unique label design with photos, patterns, or meaningful messages.

highlights.title: Natural soy wax
highlights.description: Choose our natural soy wax candles to enjoy premium quality, healthier scents, and eco-friendly materials wrapped in your custom design.

cta.title: Customized Decorative Pattern Series
cta.description: Explore our customized decorative collections, designed to inspire creativity and support unique candle designs for your brand.

inquiry.title: Need Better Customization Support?
inquiry.description: Share your target market, fragrance idea, candle type, and packaging request to start a tailored customization discussion.
